backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining IELTS test management system with data models (Test, Question, StudentResponse), CRUD operations for tests (with hardcoded authentication for sayemahtesham/12345678) and student responses (no auth), plus automated scoring logic for multiple question types.
backend/migration.mo: Empty migration module that returns an empty record, used for data migration during canister upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting authentication requirement implementation for test creation (username 'sayemahtesham', password '12345678') and login modal component with high confidence test coverage.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components (App, TestManagementPanel, CreateTestPanel, AuthModal, etc.), hooks (useQueries with AuthCredentials, useTestForm, useAuth), and styling configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading main.tsx for the IELTS Test Management System.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing global application state (viewMode, selectedTest, currentResponse) and coordinating between TestManagementPanel and RightPanelContainer with header and footer layout.
frontend/src/components/AuthModal.tsx: Authentication modal dialog component with username/password inputs, form validation, error display, and callbacks for login success/failure with loading states.
Modal dialog for creating new tests that receives AuthCredentials prop, uses useTestForm hook for state management, validates form, converts to backend format, and passes credentials to useCreateTest mutation.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying 'Powered By Sayem Ahtesham' with centered text and border styling.
A form component for building individual test questions with configurable question types (multiple choice, true/false, short answer, etc.), options management, and marks assignment. Supports different question types based on test type (writing vs. reading).
frontend/src/components/ResponseDetailsP: Displays detailed view of a single student response including student info, test details, scores, IELTS band, and individual question answers with correct/incorrect indicators. Includes back navigation and PDF export functionality.
frontend/src/components/ResponseViewer.t: A table-based list view of all student responses with search functionality, displaying student names, batch numbers, test titles, scores, and IELTS bands. Supports deletion and navigation to detailed response view.
frontend/src/components/ResultsPanel.tsx: Shows test results after submission with score breakdown, IELTS band, accuracy percentage, time taken, and toggleable correct answers display. Includes navigation back to home and detailed question-by-question review.
frontend/src/components/RightPanelContai: Container component that conditionally renders TestInterface, ResultsPanel, ResponseViewer, or a welcome screen based on the current app state and view mode.
frontend/src/components/StudentRegistrat: A modal dialog that collects student name and batch number before allowing test access. Prevents dismissal until information is provided.
frontend/src/components/TestInterface.ts: Main test-taking interface with student registration, timer, question navigation, answer collection, and submission. Manages test state and displays questions one at a time with progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/TestManagementPa: Displays a panel for managing tests with search/filter functionality, create test button, and view responses button. Handles authentication flow before allowing test creation and renders a scrollable list of test cards.
frontend/src/components/TestQuestionDisp: Renders individual test questions with appropriate input controls based on question type (multiple choice, true/false/not given, short answer, long answer, etc.). Handles answer changes and displays question text with type labels.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity. Invalidates and refetches dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Provides simple session-based authentication with hardcoded credentials stored in sessionStorage. Exposes login, logout, and credential retrieval functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication context and provider using @dfinity/auth-client. Manages identity state, login flow, and delegation validation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including CRUD operations for tests and student responses. Uses the actor hook and manages query cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useResponseManagement: Provides filtering logic for student responses based on search term, returning filtered results memoized for performance.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestFiltering.ts: Manages test filtering state and logic with search term and test type filters, returning memoized filtered test results.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestForm.ts: Manages complex test creation form state including questions, validation, and conversion between frontend form data and backend Test type. Provides CRUD operations for questions within the form.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestSubmission.ts: Custom React hook that handles test submission logic, calculates IELTS band scores based on correct answers (39+ = Band 9.0 down to 15+ = Band 5.0), grades answers excluding long-answer questions, and creates student response records via mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestTimer.ts: Custom React hook providing timer functionality with start, pause, and reset controls, tracking elapsed seconds and formatting time as MM:SS for test-taking sessions.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining light and dark theme color schemes using OKLCH color space, including sidebar, chart, and semantic UI colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, rendering the main App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending default theme with custom OKLCH-based color system, container settings, border radius variables, custom shadows, and keyframe animations for accordions and transitions.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing an IELTS test management system with authenticated test creation, open test-taking, automatic scoring with band estimation, multiple question types, and a two-column responsive dashboard layout.
